details.IncidentDetail: "[2] #3,4 LANES CLOSED FOR FWY REPAIRS / APPROX LASTING 4 HRS"

"[30] 74-30 CT ADV SETTING UP HARD CLOSURE FOR #3,4 LANES WILL BE 97 IN 30 TO SET IT UP / CT GOING TO HAVE A CREW TO REPAIR IT / BIG PIECE OF METAL STICKING UP FROM GROUND / REQ SIG ALERT FOR APPROX 4 HRS / VIA LL [Shared]"
